hero.description: Tensorlinx致力于为全球企业提供前沿的人工智能解决方案，通过创新技术推动行业数字化转型
hero.slideTitle: 吴翔于2月25日正式接任NAVF（香港）联席主席
hero.slideDescription: 17日联席举行投票，右派候选人吴翔获得BTC赞成票0.81枚，ETH赞成票0.3枚，获票数领先左派候选人。意味着右派长达3年的治理结束，NAVF将步入新的秩序治理中。
hero.slide2Title: 关于董事批准了Utopia项目迁移境外和成立技术委员会
hero.slide2Description: Utopia项目已经完全从盈利公司中剥离出去，正式成为一个独立的开源组织。
hero.slide3Title: 即将发布乌托邦3的x64平台操作系统
hero.slide3Description: 为AI全新定制的操作系统将改变您的生活，我们通过增加类WSL来兼容Linux的软件生态，将应用程序与内核施行更加安全的设计！

cookie.title: Cookie 政策
cookie.description: 我们使用必要的 Cookie 来确保网站正常运行。我们也使用分析 Cookie 来了解访客如何与网站互动，这有助于我们改进服务。您可以通过下面的选项来控制 Cookie 设置。

products.title: 最新产品展示
products.subtitle: 探索我们的创新产品解决方案

items.title: simplePHP
items.description: SimplePHP 是一个注重安全性和性能的轻量级 PHP 框架。它提供了简洁且强大的MVC架构，同时引入了缓存系统、前端资源优化和安全措施等现代化功能，使开发者能够快速构建高质量的网页应用。

items.title: ZenodoCPU推理通用数据库和推理脚本
items.description: 快速剖析大型语言模型的技术基础，使用UoomiNumPy，然后直接在CPU上运行，无需任何框架即可即时测试。

items.title: uoomi-v1-1.7b
items.description: uoomi-v1-1.7b 的Model Card 这是一个小型模型，拥有17.8亿个参数，源自Qwen大型模型。其参数大小较小，不适合回答复杂问题。uoomi-v1-1.7b 模型专为个人开发者设计，用于嵌入、优化或进一步微调。它允许用户创建自定义对话模板。

items.title: 乌托邦微内核v1.0版本
items.description: 乌托邦微内核1.0版本主要兼容于x64、x86,是一个用 Rust 编写的现代操作系统内核项目，支持 VGA 显示、串口通信和日志系统。

about.title: 关于TensorLinx
about.description1: TensorLinx成立于2020年，是一家专注于人工智能技术研发与应用的创新型科技企业。我们拥有一支由资深AI专家和工程师组成的专业团队，致力于为各行业客户提供领先的AI解决方案。
about.description2: 公司总部位于北京，在上海、深圳设有分支机构。我们已为超过200家企业提供AI技术服务，涵盖金融、制造、医疗、教育等多个行业领域。

footer.aboutDesc: Tensorlinx是一家专注于计算机基础设施建设的科技企业

hero.title: Building the Intelligent Future with
hero.subtitle: Technology
hero.description: TensorLinx is committed to providing cutting-edge artificial intelligence solutions for global enterprises, driving industry digital transformation through innovative technology
hero.slideTitle: Wu Xiang officially assumes the position of Co-Chairman of NAVF (Hong Kong) on February 25
hero.slideDescription: On the 17th, a joint vote was held, and right-wing candidate Wu Xiang received 0.81 BTC approval votes and 0.3 ETH approval votes, leading the left-wing candidate in votes received. This means the end of three years of right-wing governance, and NAVF will enter a new order of governance.
hero.slide2Title: Regarding the Board's Approval of Utopia Project Migration Overseas and Establishment of Technical Committee
hero.slide2Description: The Utopia project has been completely spun off from the for-profit company and has officially become an independent open-source organization.
hero.slide3Title: Utopia 3 x64 platform operating system coming soon
hero.slide3Description: The AI-customized operating system will change your life. We have added WSL-like compatibility with the Linux software ecosystem, implementing a more secure design for applications and the kernel!

cookie.title: Cookie Policy
cookie.description: We use necessary cookies to ensure the website functions properly. We also use analytics cookies to understand how visitors interact with the website, which helps us improve our services. You can control cookie settings through the options below.

items.title: simplePHP
items.description: SimplePHP is a lightweight PHP framework focused on security and performance. It provides a clean and powerful MVC architecture with modern features including caching systems, frontend asset optimization, and security measures, enabling developers to quickly build high-quality web applications.

items.title: ZenodoCPU Inference Database and Scripts
items.description: Quickly analyze the technical foundation of large language models using UoomiNumPy, then run directly on CPU for instant testing without any framework.

items.title: uoomi-v1-1.7b
items.description: uoomi-v1-1.7b Model Card - This is a small model with 1.78 billion parameters, derived from the Qwen large model. With a relatively small parameter size, it is not suitable for answering complex questions. The uoomi-v1-1.7b model is designed specifically for individual developers for embedding, optimization, or further fine-tuning. It allows users to create custom dialogue templates.

items.title: Utopia Microkernel v1.0
items.description: Utopia Microkernel v1.0 is mainly compatible with x64 and x86 architectures. It is a modern operating system kernel project written in Rust, supporting VGA display, serial communication, and logging systems.

about.title: About TensorLinx
about.description1: Founded in 2020, TensorLinx is an innovative technology company focused on artificial intelligence research and application. We have a professional team of senior AI experts and engineers, dedicated to providing leading AI solutions for customers across industries.
about.description2: Headquartered in Beijing with branches in Shanghai and Shenzhen, we have provided AI technology services to over 200 enterprises across finance, manufacturing, healthcare, education and other industries.

footer.aboutDesc: Tensorlinx is a technology company focused on computer infrastructure construction
